title: Blackboard Chalk Board Wall Sticker Wrapping Paper 17.3" x 118.1" Home School Office Self Adhesive Large Black Wallpaper Contact Paper Magic Sheet Sticky Roll for Wall Paint Planner Menu Chalkboard
features: EXPRESS YOURSELF: Use our peel and stick chalkboard to express your creativity with chalks. With plenty of space to write menus, nice messages, to-do lists and much more.

EASY TO USE: Simply peel the vinyl chalkboard off of its paper backing and then stick to a smooth flat surface. It can be made into any size. Adheres to all smooth surfaces, quick to apply, easy to attach, easy to cut, and remove without adhesive residue. Children should use it with their parents.
DURABLE: Manufactured out of a strong vinyl material for long lasting quality. Dry or wet wipe, tear-resistant,self-adhesive,waterproof and removable.

GREAT FOR ANY SPACE: White board sticker can be used as meeting board, message board,children education board or drawing board,also as Holiday reminder, Conference record, Work schedule,and all type shops.
WRITTEN TIPS: Normal chalks can used in 44*200cm blackboard sticker, Liquid chalks Not Recommended.
